overall.description: A first-person night hike through a dense forest trail illuminated by a warm flashlight or headlamp. The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt path surrounded by trees and undergrowth, with very limited visibility beyond the light beam.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective walking through a dark forest trail at night. A warm flashlight illuminates the narrow dirt path ahead, revealing dense undergrowth and tree trunks on both sides while the canopy blocks any sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with passing trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, adjusting slightly to follow the path's curve

segments.scene_description: The hiker continues through the enclosed forest trail, navigating a gentle curve to the right. Trees and bushes pass by on both sides as the flashlight beam sweeps across the dirt path, with vegetation density remaining consistent.

events.description: large rock formation becomes visible on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the trail, passing a large rock formation on the right

entered.detail: large light-colored rock or boulder visible beside the trail

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the trail continues through the dark forest as a large rock formation emerges on the right side, illuminated by the flashlight. The hiker passes this geological feature while the dense vegetation and narrow dirt path remain consistent with the earlier sections.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic night forest that maintains its dense atmosphere while revealing new geological features. It begins with a warm flashlight beam cutting through the darkness to illuminate a narrow dirt path flanked by thick undergrowth and a heavy canopy. As the hiker moves forward, the camera navigates a gentle curve to the right, sweeping the light across passing trees and bushes. The scene then continues along the consistent trail before the beam catches a large rock formation emerging from the darkness on the right. Finally, the camera passes this geological feature, remaining enclosed by the dense vegetation of the forest.
